title: ra`am #7481
definition:
1) to thunder
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to make the sound of thunder, thunder
        1a2) to rage
    1b) (Hiphil)
        1b1) to thunder, cause thunder
        1b2) to tremble, cause to tremble (by extension)
